!Engine_antitheft_enable.comment: Indicates the status of the engine antitheft

AC_Active.comment: Indicates if the air conditioning system is active

AC_Fan2_request.comment: Indicates that there has been a request to switch fan 2 on

AC_Power_absorbed.comment: Measure of power absorbed by air conditioning unit - varies with Ac_in_pulse_off_width

AC_Relay_drive.comment: AC Relay Drive mapped to SPI Medium Power Driver

AC_Type_configuration_NVV.comment: Indicates the type of air conditioner configured

Air_temp_inlet_linearised [\u00b0C].comment: Air temp inlet linearised for freeze frame

Air_temperature.comment: Air temperature read and calibrated from the air temperature sensor

Air_temperature [\u00b0C].comment: air extern temperature for freeze frame

Air_temperature_inlet.comment: Air temperature inlet read and calibrated from the air temperature inlet sensor

AMF_Demand [mg/str].comment: Air mass flow demand for freeze frame

AMF_Feedback.comment: Air flow per stoke calculated from the air mass flow sensor input

Aircharge_estimated.comment: Air flow per stoke estimated from Air Mass Flow Estimator

antitheft_get_etaprot().comment: Boolean indicating whether status is protected

ASR_MSR_Ack.comment: Indicate the status of the ASR/MSR

Auto_gearbox_fitted_NVV.comment: Non-volatile variable to indicate the type of gearbox fitted: 0 : BVM, 1: BVA, 2 : BVR

Battery_voltage.comment: This is the voltage read on the battery voltage input after it has been validated

Brake_light_switch_active.comment: Signals the status of the brake light switch input

Brake_safety_switch_active.comment: Signals the status of the brake safety switch

Brake_sw_active.comment: Indicate that either the brake light switch or the brake safety switch is active

CAN_CE_Lamp.comment: Indicates the state of the check engine lamp drive

CAN_Clutch_active.comment: Status of the clutch.Output via CAN message Inj_hdg

CAN_Diag_on.comment: Flag used to indicate if CAN diagnostics are enabled

CAN_Driver_request.comment: Value calculated and output via CAN message Inj_base_rapide representing a calculated pedal position

CAN_Engine_speed.comment: Scaled engine speed output via the CAN message

CAN_Major_fault_lamp.comment: Indicates the state of the major fault lamp drive

CAN_Reset.comment: Indicate if this is the first message since after a power up

CC_Abnorm_deac_ems_NVV.comment: Abnormal deactivation due to engine management problem

CC_Brake_2_pres_failure.comment: Indicates the presence of a failure of both brake switches

CC_CO_Cruise_control_lamp.comment: Commanded state of the cruise lamp

CC_CO_Target_speed_blink.comment: Indicating the status of the requested speed indication. 0 = indicator fixed 1 = indicator flashing

CC_Cruise_control_state <> CC_DISABLED.comment: State of the cruise control subsystem

CC_CS_Accel_switch_engaged.comment: indicates whether the accel switch is currently active

CC_CS_Decel_switch_engaged.comment: indicates whether the decel switch is currently active

CC_CS_Limiter_switch_state.comment: state of the switch at present

CC_CS_Resume_request.comment: indicates whether the resume switch is currently active

CC_SL_Speed_limiter_state <> SL_DISABLED.comment: State of the speed limiter subsystem

CC_TS_Target_speed_.comment: Target speed programmed in the cruise app

CE_Lamp_drive.comment: Indicates the state of the CE lamp drive

Check_engine_lamp_drive_mode.comment: Indicates the state of the engine lamp drive
